posts.text: If you work in HR, you know the feeling. • The nonstop Slack messages. • The employee situations that keep you up at night. • The pressure to fix everything immediately. • The expectation to stay calm while juggling impossible priorities. HR professionals are expected to be strategic…while living in constant reaction mode. We created the The Way of the HR Warrior online courses because HR deserves better support. Using our CHARGE® framework, these courses help HR professionals develop the mindset, confidence, and influence needed to lead beyond the chaos. And we built them the way we wish learning existed when we were HR professionals: ✔ Conversational ✔ Practical ✔ Bite-sized ✔ Story-driven ✔ Actionable No perfection. No jargon. Just honest guidance from people who have actually done the work. “The conversational, story-driven design actually keeps you engaged and feels relatable… moving beyond textbook examples to situations that reflect real-world challenges HR professionals face.” — Kaycee O'Neill, Director of Human Resources & Operations We can’t wait to share these with you soon. Join the Waitlist link: https://lnkd.in/gSX7yeVH #HRWarrior #HRLife #PeopleOperations #HRProfessionals #Leadership #EmployeeExperience #HRCommunity
posts.hook: If you work in HR, you know the feeling.
posts.name: Keri Ohlrich

posts.text: HR wasn’t meant to be endless firefighting. Yet so many HR professionals spend their days reacting instead of influencing. Constantly on call. Solving problems. Carrying the emotional weight of organizations while trying to create meaningful change. We know because we’ve lived it. That’s exactly why we created the The Way of the HR Warrior course series built around our CHARGE® framework. These courses are designed to help HR professionals: • Move from reactive to influential • Build confidence and credibility • Navigate hard conversations with courage • Make a lasting impact on employees and organizations • Actually enjoy the work they love This isn’t corporate fluff or textbook HR theory. It’s real talk. Real case studies. Real tools. Created by people who have been in the trenches and truly understand the complexity of modern HR. Because we see you. And honestly? We love HR people. You deserve development that feels human, practical, empowering, and actionable. And others agree. ❤️ “Finding HR Warrior felt like finding my tribe. It was the first time I felt understood as a human in HR, rather than just a corporate cog.” — Jessika Grenner, Director of People Operations Join the Waitlist link: https://lnkd.in/gSX7yeVH #HRWarrior #HRLeadership #HumanResources #HRCommunity #PeopleLeaders
posts.hook: HR wasn’t meant to be endless firefighting.
posts.name: Keri Ohlrich

posts.text: The most successful HR professionals aren’t the ones who simply react faster. They’re the ones who influence better. Influence culture. Influence leaders. Influence decisions. Influence change. That’s the heart behind The Way of the HR Warrior and our CHARGE® framework. We believe HR professionals deserve tools that help them: ✨ Lead with courage ✨ Build trust and credibility ✨ Communicate with confidence ✨ Stay human while driving business results And most importantly, feel less alone in this work. These upcoming courses combine: ✔ Real-world case studies ✔ Practical tools ✔ Action planning ✔ Honest conversations ✔ Lessons learned from years inside HR leadership Because HR is deeply human work. And the people doing it deserve development built for reality. “What differentiates these courses is the deep understanding behind them. They reflect the reality of HR today: complex, fast-moving, and deeply human.” — Ruth Hendrickson, Chief People Officer & Founder, R15 Advisory We’re so excited to bring this to the HR community. Join the Waitlist link: https://lnkd.in/gSX7yeVH #TheWayOfTheHRWarrior #CHARGEFramework #HRLeadership #FutureOfHR #HumanResources #PeopleAndCulture #HRProfessionals
